case_title: WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC VS. THOMAS A. WIDENER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC DBA LOANMART

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2018 BY PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT MONTEJANO, LITIGATION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC DBA LOANMART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIDENER, THOMAS A. BOCCA, CHRISTLE MARIE $2,482.78 PRINCIPAL, $2,990.17 INTEREST, $325.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,798.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
